title: Teleport Circles: Henge Structure
description: A Henge structure for fast travel
body:
Adds a henge structure with a Teleportation Circle. They allow free fast travel throughout the overworld in fixed locations.

Locate with ```/locate structure telecir_henge:henge```


Requires [Teleport Circles](https://modrinth.com/mod/teleport-circles)
 
When first summoned, circles are dormant and nameless. Interact to activate and assign a random name. Interact with an active circle to see a list of other active circles. Select a desination from the list to instantly teleport. Rename a circle by clicking its name above the list in the gui.
